title: Seismic Control PASS: quiet → p_wave → surface_wave in 2 lawful moves
_fixture_purpose: Second physical domain instance of QA_PLAN_CONTROL_COMPILER_CERT.v1. Proves that seismic wave pattern control obeys the same kernel-governed compilation law as cymatics, but in an independent physical domain (elastic wave propagation vs. Faraday instability). The two-move path quiet→p_wave→surface_wave maps to the QA orbit transition singularity→satellite→cosmos — the same orbit trajectory as cymatics flat→stripes→hexagons, despite completely different physics. This cross-domain equivalence is the core claim of [106]'s domain-genericity.

setup.filter_chain: gain→bandpass→lowpass chain matches QA generator alphabet
setup.notes: Canonical demo control path for QA_SEISMIC_CONTROL_CERT.v1. Demonstrates singularity→cosmos orbit transition via 2 lawful seismic processing moves. QA thesis: modular state-address selection via lawful generator sequence governs seismic wave pattern transitions identically to cymatic pattern transitions.
